summary: A printing and design services app/website. The project displays multiple service categories (Design Services, Digital Printing, Outdoor Printing, Indoor Printing, Screen Printing & Personalization, Offset Printing) each with sub-items and sample pictures.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Graphic design workspace with colorful logos and brand identity materials on a desk (service-design.dim_800x500.png)
- Stack of professionally printed business cards, flyers and brochures on a clean surface (service-digital-printing.dim_800x500.png)
- Large outdoor flex banner and signboard installation on a building exterior (service-outdoor-printing.dim_800x500.png)
- Collection of die-cut stickers, vinyl prints and indoor banners displayed on a wall (service-indoor-printing.dim_800x500.png)
- Colorful custom printed t-shirts, pens and balloons arranged together (service-screen-printing.dim_800x500.png)
- Offset printing press machine with stacked magazines, catalogs and paper bags (service-offset-printing.dim_800x500.png)

existing_features.title: Update the ServicesPage to display exactly 6 service categories, each with its listed sub-items and a sample image: (1) Design Services — Logo Design, Brand Identity, Marketing Materials, Social Media Graphics, Packaging Design, Photo Editing; (2) Digital Printing — Business Cards, Flyers & Brochures, Posters, Letterheads, Envelopes, Books; (3) Outdoor Printing — Flex Banners, Star Flex, Signboards, Canvas; (4) Indoor Printing — Stickers (Die-cut), Stickers (White/Black/Grey back), Transparent Stickers, Vinyl Printing, Indoor Banners, Canvas Prints, Posters; (5) Screen Printing & Personalization — Pen Printing, T-Shirt Printing, Balloon Printing, Sublimation Printing, DTF (Direct to Film) Printing; (6) Offset Printing — with description 'Cost-effective bulk printing with consistent quality for large volume orders' and sub-items: Magazines, Catalogs, Books, Packaging / Cardboard Boxes, Paper Bags. Each category card must display its sample image (from frontend/public/assets/generated/), the category title, the sub-item list, and a 'Get a Quote' CTA button.
Render the 6 generated service category sample images as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated/ and reference them in the ServicesPage component.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update services section with 6 categories (Design Services, Digital Printing, Outdoor Printing, Indoor Printing, Screen Printing & Personalization, Offset Printing) and their sub-items, each with sample pictures
